import {OptionButton, SubmitButton, QuizThemeContent} from "../components/Button" import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; export default function Question({quizName}){ // console.log(quizName.props.name) quizName = "HTML" const [questionNum, setQuestionNum] = useState(0); let questionText = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(quizName)); console.log(questionText.questions) // console.log(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("HTML"))) return (

Question {questionNum+1} of 10

Which of these color contrast ratios defines the minimum WCAG 2.1 Level AA requirement for normal text?

kek kek kek kek
) }
